data.title: Cboe Global Markets declared a dividend of $0.72 per share for Q1 2026.
data.description: In Chicago on February 13, 2026, Cboe Global Markets, Inc., a prominent derivatives and securities exchange network, revealed that its Board of Directors has approved a quarterly cash dividend of $0.72 per common stock share for the initial quarter of 2026.

data.title: National Cancer Prevention Month promotes PSA screenings by ProCure Proton Therapy Center for detecting prostate cancer early. #ProstateCancer #PSAScreenings #CancerPrevention
data.description: A proton therapy center in Somerset, New Jersey, has emphasized the importance of prostate-specific antigen (PSA) screenings for men during National Cancer Prevention Month. The center, ProCure, is urging men to prioritize these screenings as they are a vital initial step in detecting prostate cancer early. Detecting prostate cancer early can significantly improve outcomes. The announcement was made on February 13, 2026.

data.title: MercadoLibre, Inc. (Nasdaq: MELI) to report Q4 2025 results on Feb 24, 2026, including video webcast and conference call at 5:00pm ET.
data.description: Uruguay-based company MercadoLibre, Inc. (Nasdaq: MELI) has disclosed plans to report its financial outcomes for the fourth fiscal quarter concluding on December 31, 2025, on February 24, 2026. The company is scheduled to conduct an earnings results video conference, along with a conference call and audio webcast, on the same day at 5:00 p.m. Eastern Time. Interested parties, including investors, analysts, and the broader market audience, can access the video webcast and live audio during the event.

data.title: ETH open interest hits 3-year low, sparking talks of potential short squeeze and Ether rally to $2,500.
data.description: According to traders, Ethereum is experiencing a decrease in open interest and futures funding rates, which could pave the way for a major short squeeze on bearish leveraged positions. This may lead to a potential rally pushing the price up to $2,500.
New Chief Executive Officer, Stephen H. Willard, appointed by Longeveron®.

data.title: Inotiv alerts public about cybersecurity breach discovered on Aug 8, 2025.
data.description: On February 13, 2026, Inotiv, Inc. (NASDAQ: NOTV), a top contract research organization focused on nonclinical and analytical drug discovery, disclosed a cybersecurity breach discovered on August 8, 2025. The breach affected their research models and related services.

data.title: Cornerstone Funds (CLM & CRF) to continue monthly distributions per policy, with specific amounts not mentioned.
data.description: On February 13, 2026, Cornerstone Strategic Investment Fund, Inc. (NYSE American: CLM) with CUSIP 21924B302 and Cornerstone Total Return Fund, Inc. (NYSE American: CRF) with CUSIP 21924U300, both closed-end management investment companies, declared their distributions. Each Fund, following its monthly distribution policy, announced the following distributions.

data.title: Visionary Holdings Inc. received $450,000 in debt financing by issuing senior secured convertible promissory note for $500,000.
data.description: Visionary Holdings Inc. (NASDAQ: GV) recently revealed that they partnered with an institutional investor in December 2025, by entering a securities purchase agreement. As part of this agreement, the company issued a senior secured convertible promissory note worth $500,000 (the “December 2025 Note”) to the investor. In return, Visionary received gross proceeds totaling $450,000 from this transaction.

data.title: Natural Alternatives International, Inc. reported a $2.6M net loss on $34.8M net sales in Q2 2026, from $2.2M loss in Q2 prior year.
data.description: In Carlsbad, California, on February 13, 2026, Natural Alternatives International, Inc. ("NAI") (Nasdaq: NAII), a prominent provider of personalized nutritional supplements, revealed a net loss of $2.6 million, equivalent to $0.42 per diluted share. This announcement comes as a result of their second-quarter fiscal year 2026 performance, with reported net sales amounting to $34.8 million. Contrasting this with the second quarter of the previous fiscal year, where they recorded a net loss of $2.2 million, or $0.37 per diluted share, NAI shows a slight increase in losses this year.

data.title: KBRA assigns A+ rating to City of Chicago O'Hare International Airport Revenue Bonds Series 2026A, $10.8B affirmed rating.
data.description: KBRA has assigned an A+ long-term rating to the City of Chicago's Chicago O'Hare International Airport General Airport Senior Lien Revenue Bonds (O'Hare GARBs), Series 2026A (Non-AMT). At the same time, KBRA has reaffirmed the A+ rating on the City's around $10.8 billion of Chicago O'Hare International Airport General Airport Senior Lien Revenue Bonds. The Outlook for this rating is Stable. The City's O'Hare GARBs are backed by a first lien pledge of Net Revenues.

data.title: Edesa Biotech (Nasdaq: EDSA) reports Q1 2026 results, financials for three months ended December 31, 2025.
data.description: Today, Edesa Biotech, Inc. (Nasdaq:EDSA), a company specializing in host-directed therapeutics for immuno-inflammatory diseases, released financial data for the quarter ending December 31, 2025. The report also included a business update, highlighting their progress in the clinical-stage biopharmaceutical field.

data.title: Trump Media's Truth Social launching ETFs tied to Bitcoin, Ethereum, and Cronos, offering crypto exposure to investors.
data.description: Truth Social Funds has filed applications for Exchange Traded Funds (ETFs) providing investors with exposure to cryptocurrency. One ETF concentrates on Bitcoin and Ethereum, while the other focuses on Cronos. These funds aim to offer investment opportunities in the cryptocurrency market.

data.title: Heartflow, Inc. to reveal 2025 financial outcomes on March 18, 2026 after market close; conference call at 1:30 p.m. PT.
data.description: In Mountain View, California, on February 13, 2026, Heartflow, Inc. revealed that it is set to disclose its financial performance for the fourth quarter and full year of 2025 post-market closure on Wednesday, March 18, 2026. The organization, a pioneer in AI technology for coronary artery disease (CAD) and listed as HTFL on Nasdaq, will conduct a conference call to review the financial results at 1:30 p.m. Pacific Time / 4:30 p.m. Eastern Time on the same day.

data.title: Copper Property CTL Pass Through Trust in N.J. shares estimated 2025 tax info; official data to be out by March 31, 2026. Download from website.
data.description: A trust named Copper Property CTL Pass Through Trust in Jersey City, N.J., has released estimated Federal income tax details for its 2025 earnings on its website. The final information is expected to be available by March 31, 2026. However, it is important to note that the information provided is not intended as tax advice, and individuals are advised to consult their tax advisor for further guidance. It is emphasized that no reliance should be placed on the information shared on the website for tax purposes.
US bank deposits rose to $18.719 trln from $18.645 trln in prior week

data.title: Farmer Bros (NASDAQ: FARM) Q2 earnings missed estimates by -100.0%, reporting EPS of $-0.22 vs. $-0.11. Revenue decreased by $1.10 million.
data.description: On Friday, February 13, 2026, at 04:15 PM, Farmer Bros (NASDAQ: FARM) disclosed its Q2 financial results. The company fell short of anticipated earnings by -100.0%, with an EPS of $-0.22 compared to the projected $-0.11. Revenue also dropped by $1.10 million compared to the previous year. This continues a recent trend as in the previous quarter, Farmer Bros also missed earnings expectations. For a detailed analysis, the full story can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Western Digital (Nasdaq: WDC) to attend Morgan Stanley Conference on March 3, 2026, at 7:45 a.m. PT / 10:45 a.m. ET.
data.description: A company headquartered in San Jose, Western Digital Corporation (Nasdaq: WDC), shared that its management will take part in an upcoming investor conference. The event, Morgan Stanley Technology, Media & Telecom Conference, is scheduled for Tuesday, March 3, 2026, at 7:45 a.m. PT / 10:45 a.m. ET. The management presentation can be watched live through a webcast on WD’s Investor Relations site at investor.wdc.com. A replay of the presentation will also be available on the website shortly after the event.

data.title: Nektar Therapeutics closes $460M public offering with full underwriters' option exercised.
data.description: In San Francisco on February 13, 2026, Nektar Therapeutics, a biotechnology company listed on Nasdaq with the symbol NKTR, completed an underwritten public offering. The offering totaled $460 million and aimed at supporting the development of groundbreaking medicines in immunotherapy.

data.title: Honeywell (NASDAQ: HON) declares quarterly dividend of $1.19 per share on common stock, payable on March 13.
data.description: In Charlotte, North Carolina, on February 13, 2026, Honeywell (NASDAQ: HON) revealed that its Board of Directors approved a quarterly dividend of $1.19 per share for its common stock. Shareholders of record as of the specified date will receive this dividend on March 13, 2026.
